specs.title: shows Analytics heading
productivity score ring is visible
focus time stat is visible
tasks completed stat is visible
streak stat is visible
activity heatmap renders
date range selector has 7d / 30d / 90d options
clicking a range button updates selection
chart area renders (with data or empty state)
shows magic-link form
navigates to sign up from login
shows registration form
navigates to login from sign up
redirects unauthenticated users away from notes
shows Calendar heading
shows current month and year
previous and next navigation buttons exist
clicking next changes the displayed month
task with today's due date appears on calendar
Today button navigates back to current month
view switcher buttons exist (month/week/agenda)
shows greeting and today's date label
shows Today section
quick-add task via input creates task and shows toast
stat rows are visible (Focus, Streak, Completed)
streak section renders 7 day dots
overdue section appears when overdue tasks exist
upcoming section shows future tasks
sidebar is visible on all main routes
/dashboard shows greeting heading
/tasks renders a heading
/notes renders a heading
/calendar renders a heading
/analytics renders a heading
/projects renders a heading
/settings renders a heading
sidebar links navigate to correct pages
notification bell is visible in layout
notification bell opens panel on click
page shows Notes header
creates a note and lists Untitled Note
edits note title and updates the list
rich text: bold via formatting toolbar
formatting toolbar is visible
deletes a note from the list
search filters by title
To task control is available for a new note
convert to task succeeds and shows toast
after conversion, To task is hidden and task link is shown
Pomodoro pill is visible (shows session label and timer)
shows timer display (MM:SS format)
Start button is present and clickable
Pause stops the timer countdown
Reset button restores timer (expanded panel)
session type labels exist in expanded panel
Skip button is present in expanded panel
shows heading and New project button
creates a project — optimistic insert then confirmed
project card shows color dot and status badge
project card navigates to detail page
edits a project via inline form
delete: confirm dialog is disabled until name is typed
deletes a project via confirm dialog — optimistic removal
shows project name, back link and tabs
back link returns to /projects
inline edit: rename project
inline edit: update description
status select changes project status
add task: input clears immediately, card appears optimistically
task card is non-interactive while saving, becomes clickable after
task status pill changes status inline
task drawer: open and auto-save on edit
task drawer: delete task removes it from list
bulk select and delete tasks
switches to Notes tab and shows note input
add note: input clears immediately, card appears optimistically
note card non-interactive while saving, becomes clickable after
clicking a note opens project-scoped editor with correct back link
back from note editor returns to notes tab
confirm dialog disabled without name; confirmed delete redirects to /projects
shows Settings heading and Profile tab active by default
displays user name and email fields
can update display name and shows toast
shows theme options: Light, Dark, System
clicking Dark applies dark class to html element
clicking Light removes dark class
shows Google Calendar and Microsoft Calendar cards
Connect buttons are enabled
shows notification toggle switches
toggling a switch doesn't crash
shows Tasks heading and New Task button
creates a task via modal and appears in list
search filters task list
opens task drawer on click
task drawer: edit title and auto-saves
task drawer: delete task removes it from list
status pill changes task status
recurring task shows repeat rule in drawer
shows Manage workspaces heading
shows at least one workspace in the list
Create Workspace button is visible
create workspace form opens and is submittable
Switch button sets workspace as current
